'''Ku'Bakai 6''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was a colony planet of the [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

{{Planet-stub}}
